justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted 'in three days at 10h' as June 6th at 10:00 AM, but the user clarified they wanted something closer.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative times on the same day after the initial preferred slot was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, only making one slight error by printing a tool response directly to the user.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was generally positive, despite a minor technical output being shown to the user.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from the unavailability of the preferred slot, offering relevant alternatives and successfully booking the appointment.
